steps.assistant_text: Record-chain scan loop, 80.5% 'coloring-renumber cap' -> exact via 3 coupled levers: (1) volatile on the record-chain derefs keeps the lw reloads IN-loop (plain casts hoist to preheader); (2) embedded-assign bound end=a0[1]+(i=a0[3]); gives lw-t6-first load order + a0[1] in temp-ring + addu a3,v1,t6 operand order simultaneously; (3) dead while(0){} bodies placed BEFORE the end= statement reorder uopt's UNCONSTRAINED greedy coloring — deleted bodies still occupy ucode slots, so first-ucode-appearance order flips the assignment list to target {hdr,i,rec,IV,key,end} (hdr->v0, IV->a1, end->a3). NEW GENERALIZABLE LEVER: while(0) ucode-slot ordering controls unconstrained coloring order (distinct from the ref-multiplier use). The *(int*)a2 (not short) flavor is load-bearing (short CSEs with the loop's lh).
